🗺️ Complete Limgrave Early Game Guide

Limgrave is the first region you'll explore in Elden Ring. This guide provides an optimized route to get you through the early game with the best weapons, items, and level-ups. Follow this path to be well-prepared for Stormveil Castle and beyond.

📊 Limgrave Overview

CategoryDetails
Recommended Level15-25
Main BossMargit, the Fell Omen
Key ItemsUchigatana, Meteorite Staff, Rock Sling, Margit's Shackle
Major AreasChurch of Elleh, Gatefront Ruins, Stormhill, Warmaster's Shack

🗺️ Optimized Route (Step-by-Step)

Step 1: The Starting Area (Level 1-5)

Location: Chapel of Anticipation → Limgrave

  1. Complete the tutorial area (Chapel of Anticipation). You'll get basic equipment and fight the first boss (optional).
  2. After the boss, take the portal to Limgrave.
  3. Open the map by interacting with the Map Stele (glowing stone pillar) just ahead.
  4. Head south to the Church of Elleh (first Site of Grace).
  5. Meet Merchant Kalé. Buy:
    • Lantern (1,500 runes) - Essential for dark areas
    • Cracked Pot (free if you ask) - For crafting
    • Animal Liver x5 (300 runes each) - For stealth
  6. Rest at the Site of Grace to level up.
💡 Tip: Don't spend too many runes yet. Save them for upgrading your weapon later.

Step 2: Get the Uchigatana (Level 5-8)

Location: Coastal Cave

  1. From the Church of Elleh, head west toward the coast.
  2. Find the Coastal Cave (marked on the map).
  3. Fight through the cave. Watch out for the Mad Pumpkin Head mini-boss.
  4. Boss Strategy: Two enemies fight you. Focus one down first, then deal with the other. They're weak to bleed.
  5. After defeating them, you'll get the Uchigatana (if you chose Wretch) or upgrade materials.
  6. The Uchigatana is one of the best early-game weapons. It causes bleed and has good range.
⚠️ Warning: The cave is dark. Bring a Lantern or you'll struggle to see enemies.

Step 3: Get the Meteorite Staff (For Sorcerers)

Location: Ruined Street (near the Sarcophagus)

  1. Head east from the Church of Elleh along the main road.
  2. You'll reach a ruined street with broken buildings.
  3. Look for a large stone sarcophagus on a cliff overlooking the ruins.
  4. On the sarcophagus, you'll find the Meteorite Staff.
  5. This staff has S-tier Intelligence scaling and boosts gravity sorceries. It's the best staff for early-game sorcerers.
💡 Tip: While you're here, also pick up the Rock Sling sorcery from a nearby corpse. It's a powerful gravity spell that works well with the Meteorite Staff.

Step 4: Level Up at Gatefront Ruins (Level 8-12)

Location: Gatefront Ruins

  1. Continue east along the main road.
  2. You'll reach Gatefront Ruins, a large camp with enemies.
  3. Activate the Gatefront Site of Grace.
  4. Clear the camp for runes (about 2,000-3,000 runes total).
  5. Level up to 12-15 at the Site of Grace.
    • Melee builds: Vigor 15, Endurance 12, Strength/Dexterity 12
    • Magic builds: Vigor 12, Mind 15, Intelligence 18
  6. Explore the ruins for loot:
    • Golden Seed (increases Flask charges) - Found in a tree to the north
    • Flask of Wondrous Physick - Found in the church to the east

Step 5: Get Margit's Shackle (Level 12-15)

Location: Warmaster's Shack

  1. From Gatefront Ruins, head north along the road.
  2. You'll reach Warmaster's Shack, a small building with a merchant inside.
  3. Talk to the merchant (Knight Bernahl). He sells Margit's Shackle (1,200 runes).
  4. This item can be used during the Margit boss fight to stun him twice. It's essential for making the fight easier.
  5. Also buy:
    • Iron Arrow x30 (if you use a bow)
    • Cuckoo Glintstone (sorcery, if you're a caster)

Step 6: Explore Stormhill (Level 15-20)

Location: Stormhill area

  1. From Warmaster's Shack, continue north to Stormhill.
  2. Activate the Stormhill Shack Site of Grace.
  3. Explore the area for runes and items:
    • Stormhill Depraved Perfumer - Mini-boss, drops useful incantations
    • Stonesword Key - Found on a corpse near the cliff edge
    • Golden Seed - Found near the Hermit Merchant's Shack
  4. Fight enemies to level up to 20-25.
  5. Optional: Visit the Hermit Merchant (near the cliff) to buy crafting materials.

Step 7: Get the Sword of St. Trina

Location: Church of Elleh (at night)

  1. Return to the Church of Elleh at night.
  2. You'll find a dead knight sitting against the wall.
  3. Examine the body to get the Sword of St. Trina.
  4. This sword causes sleep buildup, which is useful for crowd control.
💡 Tip: If you missed the dead knight during the day, rest at the Site of Grace and select "Change Time of Day" to night.

Step 8: Prepare for Margit (Level 20-25)

Location: Stormveil Castle entrance

  1. Head to the Stormveil Castle entrance (east of Stormhill).
  2. You'll encounter Margit, the Fell Omen blocking the path.
  3. Before fighting him, make sure you have:
    • Weapon upgraded to +5 or higher
    • Margit's Shackle (from Warmaster's Shack)
    • At least 10 Flasks of Crimson Tears
    • Spirit Ash summon (optional but helpful)
  4. Level to 20-25 before the fight.

🎒 Key Items Checklist

ItemLocationUsePriority
UchigatanaCoastal CaveBest early-game katana, causes bleed⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Meteorite StaffRuined StreetBest early-game staff for sorcerers⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (magic)
Rock SlingNear Meteorite StaffPowerful gravity sorcery⭐⭐⭐⭐ (magic)
Margit's ShackleWarmaster's ShackStuns Margit twice during boss fight⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Golden Seed x2Gatefront Ruins, StormhillIncreases Flask charges⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Flask of Wondrous PhysickGatefront Ruins churchSpecial Flask with customizable effects⭐⭐⭐⭐
Sword of St. TrinaChurch of Elleh (night)Causes sleep buildup⭐⭐⭐
LanternChurch of Elleh merchantLights up dark areas⭐⭐⭐⭐

⚔️ Margit, the Fell Omen Strategy

Phase 1: Margit (100%-60% HP)

Attacks:

  • Quick combo with his staff
  • Delayed overhead slam
  • Projectile magic attacks (after 50% HP)

Strategy:

  • Use Margit's Shackle when the fight starts to stun him for 5 seconds. Attack freely.
  • Use it again when he recovers (you get 2 uses).
  • Stay close and dodge his combos. Roll toward him for most attacks.
  • Don't get greedy — land 2-3 hits, then reposition.

Phase 2: Margit with Magic (60%-0% HP)

New Attacks:

  • Glintstone projectile barrages
  • Delayed hammer slams with magic explosion
  • Faster combo strings

Strategy:

  • When he starts using magic, back off and wait for openings.
  • Dodge his projectile barrages by rolling sideways.
  • His delayed slams have a long wind-up — wait for the hammer to come down, then dodge and attack.
  • If you have a summon (spirit ash), let it distract him while you attack from behind.
💡 Easy Mode: Summon Spirit Ashes (Lone Wolf Ashes or Jellyfish Ashes) to distract Margit. This makes the fight much easier, especially for new players.

🎯 What to Do After Margit

After defeating Margit, you have two options:

Option 1: Enter Stormveil Castle

Continue into the castle to fight Godrick the Grafted. This is the main progression path.

Recommended Level: 25-30

Preparation:

  • Upgrade your weapon to +10 or higher
  • Explore the castle thoroughly for items and shortcuts
  • Defeat the optional boss (Troll) in the courtyard for runes

Option 2: Skip to Liurnia

Go around Stormveil Castle by heading north through the Ravine. This leads to Liurnia of the Lakes, the next major region.

Recommended Level: 25-30

Warning: Liurnia has higher-level enemies. You may want to return to Stormveil first for more runes.

🏆 Final Tips

Limgrave is designed to teach you the game's mechanics. Take your time, explore thoroughly, and don't rush to the next area. The better prepared you are, the easier the rest of the game will be.

Remember: If you're stuck on Margit, you can skip him and explore Liurnia to level up. You don't have to beat him to progress.
